perf.regime: v1 PER-TOKEN flash (BLOCK_M=1): one program per (global q-token, qo_head). Load the query head into registers, stream the seq's causal paged KV range [0, (nk-nq)+p+1) in BLOCK_N=64 chunks with flash online softmax. The page indirection (j -> block_table[s, j//block_size], j%block_size) lives INSIDE the chunk loop. GQA free (each program owns one qo head). Each token's seq is resolved from a host-computed seq_ids tensor (torch.searchsorted) -- one device gather, no per-program scan. HONEST PERF GAP vs BLOCK_M-tiled flash: this loads each kv position once per attending q-token = O(L^2/2) kv loads/seq with NO q-reuse tiling (the naive flash cost, not the amortized cost). It IS correct and fuses the packed batch into one launch (killing the per-token Python loop + per-token KV-gather materialization of the SDPA fallback -- the issue's unblock target), but for LONG prefills (4k+ tokens) the BLOCK_M-tiled varlen flash kernel is the documented perf follow-up. For SHORT/chunked prefill (the common decode-interleaved case) the per-token cost is fine. num_warps=4, num_stages=2.

notes: The flashinfer BatchPrefillWithPagedKVCache shape (the make-or-break serving kernel for dense GQA on AMD per issue #71, whose primary target is amd_cdna3 / gfx942). BLOCK_D=next_pow2(D) and GROUP=H_q//H_kv are tl.constexpr derived from dispatch args (cached) -- NOT user specialization_knobs. BLOCK_N=64 is the flash-chunk size (exact reduction for any size; autotune follow-up). Portable (pure tl.dot-free manual FMA + tl.exp, no vendor intrinsics); the AMD gfx942 card is the port-across-arch step (the issue's primary target -- the contract needs no change). Causal extend semantics: the p-th new token attends to kv [0, (nk-nq)+p+1); since causal_end<=nk the causal mask doubles as the valid-kv mask. PERF FOLLOW-UPS (in priority order): (1) BLOCK_M-tiled varlen flash to amortize each kv load across a q-tile -- the real flash attention speedup for long prefill; (2) the seq_ids workspace reuse (#52); (3) split-kv (the mha_merge_state #3 path) for very long context.
